title: Districts subdivisions of state
doc_html:
§1755.  Districts subdivisions of state

Gravity drainage districts and gravity sub-drainage districts so created shall be sub-divisions of the state within the meaning of the Constitution and statutes of Louisiana relating to incurring debt and issuing bonds therefor.
doc_text:
§1755.  Districts subdivisions of state
Gravity drainage districts and gravity sub-drainage districts so created shall be sub-divisions of the state within the meaning of the Constitution and statutes of Louisiana relating to incurring debt and issuing bonds therefor.
